title: Dynamic Alerting Platform — RBAC Schema (_rbac.yaml, ADR-027 / LD-6)
description: JSON Schema (draft-07) for validating _rbac.yaml — the tenant-api authorization boundary. Mirrors the STRICT (yaml KnownFields) parser in components/tenant-api/internal/rbac/rbac.go (RBACConfig / GroupRule / MatchBlock): an unknown key (e.g. `permissons:` typo) or a non-{read,write,admin} permission value that the runtime rejects as a load error is caught here at author / CI time instead. SoT = the Go structs; keep this schema in sync when a GroupRule / MatchBlock field is added. NOTE: cross-field fail-closed rules (an empty `match: {}` is a load error, an org-scope / match.claims key must be declared in --identity-claim-headers) are NOT expressible in JSON Schema and stay enforced by the parser — this schema guards shape / key-typo / enum only.

groups.title: RBAC Group Rules
groups.description: List of group rules. An absent / empty list parses to zero groups (MED-8 fail-closed: all access denied unless --rbac-empty-open).

groupRule.title: Group Rule
groupRule.description: One authorization rule. Without `match` the `name` is the IdP-group matcher (legacy shape, byte-identical to pre-P3); with `match` the `name` becomes a pure label / audit identifier.

org-scope.title: Org-scope claim key
org-scope.description: Opt-in org-scope axis (ADR-027 / LD-6 P4): the claim KEY whose caller value must be one of the target tenant's orgs (from _tenant_orgs.yaml). Must be declared in --identity-claim-headers (parser-enforced).

matchBlock.title: Claims-aware matcher (LD-6 P3)
matchBlock.description: AND across condition kinds, OR within a list. An empty match block is a LOAD ERROR at runtime (not match-all) — a cross-field rule this schema cannot express; the parser enforces it.

claims.title: Claim key → allowed values
claims.description: Each claim key maps to a list of allowed values (exact string match, OR-within); keys AND-across.
